description_long: This house features a unique, angular footprint with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by large rectangular windows and a single main entry door. The roof is a sloped shed style, with a visible red section and some flat areas, giving the structure a contemporary look. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house sits on a green, grassy plot, and the main entryway is simple, lacking a porch or decorative overhang. The overall appearance is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional, modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, angular white house with a sloped shed roof, large windows, and a minimalist entryway, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entry door, a large window, and the angular shape of the house with a visible red roof section.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the asymmetrical window arrangement and the sloped roof, with more windows visible along the length of the house.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly solid wall with a single door and minimal window openings, emphasizing the house's geometric form.
description_view_3: This side view reveals a series of large windows and the extended angular wall, with the roof's slope visible from the opposite direction.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
